item.title: ConocoPhillips sees weaker global oil demand, worsening supply crunch ahead
item.description: Importers face 'critical shortages' into summer the longer the Middle East conflict drags on, company warns

item.title: Trump cheers UAE's Opec exit. US shale may think otherwise
item.description: Unrestrained by production quotas, the UAE will be able to ramp up output and withstand market shocks that US producers cannot

item.title: ExxonMobil hands out subsea tie-back contract for Angola development
item.description: Subsea Integration Alliance to handle work for Redevelopment 2.0 Likembe Project in Block 15

item.title: ConocoPhillips reports profits drop as production outlook trimmed
item.description: Company expects lower production in second quarter due to conflict in Middle East

item.title: Repsol to hold US upstream transaction while markets remain disrupted, says CEO
item.description: Spanish major has been planning a listing in the US for the last four years

item.title: Repsol to delay US upstream transaction while markets remain disrupted, says CEO
item.description: Spanish major has been planning a listing in the US for the last four years

item.title: Explorer raises $70 million for frontier Greenland drilling campaign
item.description: US player secures funds for wells in multibillion-barrel frontier play operated by London-listed 80 Mile

item.title: TechnipFMC profits nearly double and beat analyst estimates
item.description: Company warns about impacts of perceived risk in the Middle East

item.title: TechnipFMC eyes $3 billion of new subsea opportunities as profits nearly double
item.description: Company warns about impacts of perceived risk in the Middle East

item.title: Mozambique LNG: Pouyanne says 6000 workers on site of $20 billion project
item.description: TotalEnergies chief executive estimates project more than 40% complete and still targeting 2029 start-up

item.title: Bolivia in economic and political turmoil as gas production dwindles
item.description: Recent changes at state player YPFB and Hydrocarbons Ministry underscore critical situation

item.title: Chevron sign deal to assess Libya's huge unconventional resource potential
item.description: US major and state oil company aim to evaluate shale promise of three basins

item.title: Wood hit with safety notice for UK pipeline system
item.description: UK's SAGE pipeline system transports gas from 46 North Sea fields onshore for processing

item.title: Subsea7 posts bullish final results before being absorbed into Saipem
item.description: Revenue and adjusted Ebitda guidance boosted, as chief executive heads out the door

item.title: Higher oil prices offset impact of lost Persian Gulf production, says TotalEnergies' CEO Pouyanne
item.description: Chief executive expects cashflow from non-Middle East assets to offset loss of revenues from 360,000 bpd of shut-in production

item.title: Norway's top contractor targets $9.6 billion of new work
item.description: Europe and Asia-Pacific are top targets for Aker Solutions

item.title: Middle East conflict impacts Austria's OMV
item.description: OMV lowers production forecast for rest of 2026 as it watches further impact of war in Iran on operations

item.title: Middle East disruption hits Technip Energies first quarter revenues
item.description: Iran war has slowed project execution across the Middle East

item.title: Kazakhstan denies plans to quit Opec+
item.description: Central Asian country is known for consistently producing above allocated quotas

item.title: Repsol earnings rise strongly but trail forecasts as upstream softens
High oil prices boost Sinopec's first-quarter profit
item.description: Chinese state player also stepped up upstream activities in first quarter

item.title: Chinese player wins prized contract for work at world's largest offshore gas field
item.description: The North Field, along with the extended South Pars field in the Persian Gulf, is by far the world's largest non-associated natural gas field, with ownership shared by Qatar and Iran

item.title: CNOOC Ltd profits rise on record first quarter production
item.description: Higher realised oil prices and increased oil and natural gas sales helped boost HK-listed operator's earnings

item.title: CNOOC Ltd profits rise on record first quarter oil and gas production
item.description: Higher realised oil prices and increased oil and natural gas sales helped boost the Hong Kong-listed operator's earnings

item.title: NOV reports 74% plunge in net income as Middle East war takes toll
item.description: NOV has been facing significant shipping, supply chain and operational challenges amid continued disruption at Strait of Hormuz

item.title: Australian state aims to restart gas exploration to help beat projected shortfall
item.description: New South Wales government set to launch expression of interest for acreage in Bancannia and Pondie Range troughs

item.title: Timor-Leste project prepares for EPCI phase
item.description: Finder Energy signs agreements for engineering and procurement resources, as well as reserved subsea equipment

item.title: Oil continues surge as markets feel pressure from low stockpiles, Trump’s ongoing Iran blockade
item.description: Brent hits $120 per barrel, while WTI surges past $107

item.title: Nabors sees rising US rig demand and more growth ahead post-Middle East conflict
item.description: Companies' appetites for new US drilling will grow after the Strait of Hormuz reopens, Nabors predicts

item.title: Expand Energy ‘not waiting around’ for new CEO as search for leader continues
item.description: Interim chief of US gas producer says Delfin LNG deal a ‘foundational’ contract to enter new markets
